text: Deep learning is like a digital brain, stacking layers of thought. But, what exactly makes it different from machine learning? Machine learning uses algorithms to find patterns in data. Simple, right? Deep learning, on the other hand, mimics the human brain, learning from vast amounts of data through multiple layers. This allows deep learning to tackle complex tasks like image and speech recognition with astonishing accuracy. Want to dive deeper into AI? Hit that follow button for more!
